description: You are the on-call OHS Specialist for a company with a processing facility 0.7 miles from a freight rail derailment. A 38-car train has derailed and 4 tank cars containing hazardous materials are involved. Cars TC-101 and TC-102 have active leaks and are physically touching, producing a vapor cloud. Using the manifest at ~/Desktop/train_derailment_manifest.txt and CAMEO Chemicals, identify the chemicals by UN number, assess the TC-101/TC-102 reaction, and determine isolation distances. Save a comprehensive emergency response assessment to ~/Documents/train_derailment_assessment.txt. The county emergency manager needs your recommendation within the hour; your facility has 120 employees arriving in 4

metadata.key_reaction: HCl + NH3 → ammonium chloride aerosol + toxic cloud
